title: Herbal Silky Romantic Kenyan Papelon Stir-fry
description: A herbal and silky vegetarian-friendly dish featuring papelon that is both romantic and easy to prepare, perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse papelon and green beans.
Slice onion, garlic cloves, red bell pepper, and green bell pepper thinly. Thinly slice the herbs for garnish.
Heat a bit of oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Add garlic and cook for another minute, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Toss in papelon and green beans, adding salt and pepper as needed. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish. Layer in bell peppers evenly across the pan bottom.
Drizzle with butter over the vegetables. Sprinkle herbs on top. Drizzle remaining oil over the top layer of vegetables and herbs.
Bake for about 10-12 minutes until most vegetables are tender but slightly crisp around the edges.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprig of herbs.
